chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5215 of 2013 CP D 1254 of 2014 CP D 1593 of 2014 CP D 26 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3173/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.10.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent. None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation is received. It appears that the petitioner is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these petitions are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
